title: SpiderVariety:FA
description: This pack adds more spider variants from the real world!
body:
Spider Variety is a resource pack that adds more spider variants from the real world! From tiny spiderlings to chunky tarantulas, there’s a wide variety of spider types to encounter.


![emf,etf required!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/163a6a072f1a1c62d982b30bd8d556a54cc516b7.png)


This pack features:

(The images don't feature all of the spiders)


Spiderlings:

-Brown

-White(pale garden)

-Black

-Cave variant (pale yellow with no eyes)


Big Spiders:

-Black spider

-White spider(pale garden)

-Nursery web spider

-Huntsman spider

-Orb weaver

-Cave variant (pale yellow with no eyes)

-Camel spider (not really a spider but yeah)

Tarantulas:


-Mexican orange knee


-Greenbottle blue


-Caribena versicolor


-Snow tarantula


-Brown and black tarantulas
